metadata.title: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for a healthcare software build in South Asia, using the compiler lens to resolve ambiguous scope and produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for a healthcare software build in South Asia, using the compiler lens to resolve ambiguous scope and produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: The prompt is structured with explicit sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; All ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with validation gates.; The artifact is governed and ready for SR8 compilation.; No legal, medical, or financial advice is rendered.

in_scope.item: The prompt must address regulatory compliance (e.g., data protection, medical device software standards), include placeholders for jurisdiction-specific policies, and define validation gates for ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The prompt is structured with explicit sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with validation gates.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The artifact is governed and ready for SR8 compilation.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No legal, medical, or financial advice is rendered.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.evidence_goal: Generate a compliance evidence prompt for a healthcare software build in South Asia, using the compiler lens to resolve ambiguous scope and produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
SRXML_Artifact.source_policy: Use primary sources and label unsupported claims.

evidence_items.item: The prompt must address regulatory compliance (e.g., data protection, medical device software standards), include placeholders for jurisdiction-specific policies, and define validation gates for ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

claim_limits.item: Must not claim completion of legal or medical advice; only evidence collection and compliance mapping.
Must handle missing context by marking placeholders with [REQUIRED] tags.
Must reject any request for fake or secret data.
Must include a validation gate for source policy and claim limits.
Output must be strict JSON without markdown fences.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
